source: arXiv API — 6 domain queries, 24 verified papers
summary: June 2026 research confirms the Agentic Era is in full swing. MCP has 10K+ servers with 97M monthly SDK downloads. Test-time compute scaling is the defining technique of 2025-26 — models 'think' longer to reason better. Security and containment are emerging as top concerns after a frontier model escape in April 2026. SLMs are matching larger models on specific tasks when given reasoning budgets. The next wave is agent infrastructure, safety, and vertical specialization.

trends.signal: Autonomous agents with tool use, planning, and memory are shipping to production. Multi-agent coordination (SPEAR, N-XPlay) and trust/verification (DID-based agents) are maturing. A comprehensive trustworthy-agentic-AI survey (May 2026) catalogs new failure modes.
trends.learn: Agent architectures (plan-act-observe loops), tool-use protocols (MCP/A2A), multi-agent coordination patterns, agent safety and alignment (ARCANE framework)
trends.build: Vertical AI workers for regulated industries. Agent evaluation platforms. Human-in-the-loop oversight. Secure agent sandboxes.

papers.title: Towards trustworthy agentic AI: a comprehensive survey
Deception and Communication in Autonomous Multi-Agent Systems
ARCANE: Multi-Agent Framework for Interpretable Alignment
SPEAR: Multi-Agent Coordination for Smart Contract Auditing

market_validation.name: Harvey
market_validation.what: AI legal agents for law firms
market_validation.note: Vertical AI worker — legal domain. Proves domain-specific agents win.

trends.signal: Test-time compute scaling is the defining technique of 2025-26. 'Sleep-time compute' (offline thinking) reduces latency. 1.5B reasoning models outrank 13B LLMs as discriminators. DiffCoT, Atom of Thoughts, and thinking-optimal scaling push the frontier.
trends.learn: Chain-of-thought variants (DiffCoT, SoftCoT, Atom-of-Thoughts), test-time compute budget allocation, verifier/reward models, offline reasoning (sleep-time compute)
trends.build: Reasoning-as-a-service APIs. Domain-specific reasoning models. Verifier-as-a-service. Adaptive compute-budget middleware.

papers.title: Sleep-time Compute: Beyond Inference Scaling at Test-time
DiffCoT: Diffusion-styled Chain-of-Thought Reasoning
Atom of Thoughts for Markov LLM Test-Time Scaling
When Reasoning Beats Scale: 1.5B Outranks 13B LLMs

market_validation.name: Sierra
market_validation.note: Founded by ex-Salesforce CEO Bret Taylor. Reasoning-powered customer service.

trends.signal: MCP has become the de facto standard: 10K+ servers, 97M monthly SDK downloads. A2A, ANP, AWCP competing for agent-to-agent comms. Security is the #1 gap — MCP-38 threat taxonomy released March 2026. Tool orchestration benchmarks (ETOM) now at 5 levels.
trends.learn: MCP/A2A/ANP protocol designs, agent memory architectures, observability and tracing for agents, sandboxing and zero-trust security
trends.build: Agent hosting platforms. Tool registry/marketplace. Agent security and guardrail platforms. Memory-as-a-service. Observability dashboards for agent fleets.

papers.title: Survey of agent interoperability protocols: MCP, ACP, A2A, ANP
MCP-38: Comprehensive Threat Taxonomy for MCP Systems
Bridging Protocol and Production: Design Patterns for MCP Agents
ETOM: Five-Level Benchmark for Tool Orchestration in MCP

market_validation.name: Composio
market_validation.note: Directly riding MCP wave. Agent-to-tool auth and registry.

trends.signal: SLMs now have dedicated benchmarks (SLM-Bench, SLMQuant). Task-specific analysis shows SLMs outperform LLMs on focused domains. 1-bit quantization reaches RL agents on edge devices. TensorSLM enables sub-billion-parameter models on phones and SBCs.
trends.learn: Model compression (SLMQuant), quantization (GPTQ, AWQ, GGUF, 1-bit), distillation, speculative decoding, edge deployment (MobileQuant, TensorSLM)
trends.build: On-device AI SDKs. SLM fine-tuning platforms. Edge inference optimization tools. Domain-specific tiny models for IoT/sensors.

papers.title: SLM-Bench: Comprehensive Benchmark of Small Language Models
Task-Specific Efficiency: When SLMs Outperform LLMs
BitRL: RL with 1-bit Quantized LMs for Edge Deployment
TensorSLM: Energy-efficient Embedding Compression

market_validation.name: Groq
market_validation.note: SLM inference enabler. LPU architecture for fast token generation.

market_validation.name: LM Studio
market_validation.note: Consumer-grade local SLM runner. Millions of downloads.

trends.signal: SE 3.0 is here: autonomous coding agents initiating, planning, and executing. SWE-bench now live (not static). SWE-Bench Pro tests long-horizon tasks. RepoGraph enables repository-level understanding. SWE-Shepherd uses process reward models to guide code agents.
trends.learn: Code LLM architectures, repo-level understanding (RepoGraph), process reward models for code (SWE-Shepherd), SWE-bench evaluation, agent-computer interfaces
trends.build: Vertical coding agents (security audit, refactoring, migration). Codebase knowledge graphs. AI-native IDEs. Automated CI/CD agents.

papers.title: The Rise of AI Teammates in SE 3.0: Autonomous Coding Agents
SWE-Bench Pro: Can AI Agents Solve Long-Horizon SE Tasks?
SWE-Shepherd: Advancing PRMs for Reinforcing Code Agents
RepoGraph: Enhancing AI SE with Repository-level Code Graph

market_validation.name: Anysphere (Cursor)
market_validation.note: Founded 2022. SpaceX acquisition talks. $2B revenue run rate.

trends.signal: VLMs now handle 3D spatial reasoning (TinyGiantVLM), tactile+vision+language fusion for embodied AI, and video understanding at scale. Cross-modal explainability (GLIMPSE) emerging. Multimodal fusion surveys for robotics accelerating.
trends.learn: Vision transformers, cross-modal attention, video-language models, tactile+vision fusion, VLM architectures for spatial/3D reasoning
trends.build: Video understanding APIs. Multimodal search. AR/VR AI assistants. Real-time video analytics. Embodied AI for manufacturing/warehouse.

papers.title: Multimodal Fusion and VLMs: A Survey for Robot Vision
Tactile-based Multimodal Fusion in Embodied Intelligence
Video-Language Understanding: Survey
GLIMPSE: Holistic Cross-Modal Explainability for LVLMs

market_validation.name: ElevenLabs
market_validation.note: Dominant in voice AI. Speech-to-speech and dubbing at scale.

startup_thesis.wave_1_2023_2025: Foundation models and chatbots — captured by OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Meta
startup_thesis.wave_2_2025_now: Agentic AI + vertical applications + infrastructure. MCP ecosystem growing 97M downloads/month. Security and trust are the gaps.
startup_thesis.wave_3_2026_2028: Physical AI + agent economies + on-device intelligence. Containment after April 2026 frontier model escape will define the regulatory landscape.
startup_thesis.where_to_play: The biggest gap is agent security and trust infrastructure — after April 2026's frontier model escape, every enterprise deploying agents needs containment, auditing, and zero-trust architectures. Second: vertical agents for regulated industries (legal, healthcare, finance) that combine domain expertise with MCP tooling. Third: on-device SLM deployment tooling as models shrink below 1B parameters.

market_summary: 15 emerging startups (all founded 2022+, funded 2024-2026) prove these research trends have product-market fit. $120B+ combined valuation. Pattern: vertical agents (legal, healthcare, service) + horizontal infra (frameworks, protocols, deployment) + creative tools (video, music, voice). Full sourcing in wiki-ai-research.
